clinicalSummary: Systematic Cochrane reviews confirm that Diethylcarbamazine (DEC) is highly effective in clearing blood-borne microfilariae of Wuchereria bancrofti. Combined mass drug administration campaigns (DEC + Albendazole) significantly reduce regional transmission chains in endemic regions.
citation: WHO Guidelines on Lymphatic Filariasis Elimination (2020). Cochrane Database of Systematic Reviews.
